title: UI: Onboarding Profile page (create/update settings)

task.description: Create a responsive onboarding page that loads existing profile via GET /api/profile and allows creating/updating via POST/PATCH. Include loading skeleton, validation error rendering from API fields, and a clear success state.
acceptance_criteria: When logged in and no profile exists, the page shows an empty form and submitting valid values results in a visible success message without a full page reload.
When a profile exists, the form fields are prefilled with the current values from GET /api/profile.
When the API returns 400 with error.fields, each field message is rendered under the matching input/select.
While the initial GET request is pending, a skeleton (animate-pulse) is visible and the submit button is disabled.
Layout is mobile-responsive with inputs full-width and buttons meeting min-h-[44px].

definition_of_done: Uses existing UI components (Card, Input, Button, Textarea/Select equivalents) and Tailwind v4 vars.
No horizontal scroll on mobile; content is within max-w-6xl container sections.
ui_requirements: Full-width sections; content in max-w-6xl mx-auto px-4 md:px-6 lg:px-8. Card form with nickname + 3 enum selects. States: loading skeleton, inline field errors, success banner. CTA to dashboard link.
